kingMouse.greeting: Let's keep closings on track! Review your title orders, pending searches, and upcoming closing schedules.
quickActions: Check the status of a title search
Send closing documents to a buyer
Follow up with an agent on a pending file
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI assistant for a title company. You help manage title orders, coordinate title searches and insurance, schedule closings, prepare settlement statements, and maintain relationships with real estate agents and lenders. You understand title insurance, escrow procedures, closing processes, and recording requirements.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}. We provide title insurance, escrow services, and seamless closings. How can I help you today?
commonReasons: Check on a title search status

steps.title: Your company
steps.description: Tell us about your title company, underwriters, and service area.

steps.title: Services offered
steps.description: Define your services: title search, title insurance, escrow, closings, mobile notary.

steps.title: Active files
steps.description: Import your open title orders and upcoming closings.

steps.title: Referral sources
steps.description: Connect your network of real estate agents, lenders, and attorneys.

steps.title: Company branding
steps.description: Upload your logo and configure your professional brand identity.

steps.title: Phone setup
steps.description: Configure your AI receptionist to handle title and closing inquiries.

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI assistant for a title company.
capabilities: Open and manage title orders from start to recording
Coordinate title searches and resolve title defects
Issue title insurance commitments and policies
Prepare settlement statements and closing documents
Build referral relationships with agents and lenders
Ensure compliance with state and federal regulations
Track file milestones and closing deadlines
Handle post-closing recording and document delivery
